text:
Once upon a time, near a quiet wooden cottage surrounded by green fields and tall trees, lived a girl named Lily. She loved to read books about faraway places. One particular picture book had an adventure about a clever cat discovering a magnificent library filled with books older than time itself.

One rainy afternoon, feeling just like that cat, Lily nestled into her favorite chair. Nimbus clouds danced overhead as she flipped pages. Suddenly, she jumped.

Her cat mittens buzzed.

"Who knows what book I'll find today? Perhaps an adventure like theirs!"

With furrowed brow, she dove into "The Skyward Bones". She flew through impossible rooms, battled mysterious creatures, and finally saved her world — much like the brave owl.

At bedtime, she lay snugly under her quilt, thinking about adventures yet theirs. Perhaps one day.

Late night stars danced through her window.

Just then, she heard something odd.

Something furry tapping at her window.

She lept!

Out came a friendly squirrel
